name: real-estate-operator
displayName: AI Expert Real Estate Operator Bundle
description: 13 skills for residential real estate agents. Showing prep, MLS follow-up, contract review, referral tracking, transaction milestones, listing presentation, buyer consultation, open house plan, neighborhood brief, weekly review, FSBO outreach, handoff, and hoard.

targetAudience.primary: Residential real estate agent (solo to team of 5)
targetAudience.secondary: Real estate teams, brokerages, transaction coordinators

skills.name: transaction-milestones
skills.purpose: Run a transaction from mutual acceptance to close

skills.name: buyer-consultation
skills.purpose: Run buyer intake and capture buyer profile

skills.name: open-house-plan
skills.purpose: Open house prep and follow-up plan

skills.name: neighborhood-brief
skills.purpose: Neighborhood brief for buyer, seller, or partner

skills.name: agent-weekly-review
skills.purpose: Weekly review across active deals and pipeline

skills.name: handoff
skills.purpose: Hand off a slice to a TC, ISA, broker, or vendor
